testcase.name: test__mlp_multiple_layers_forward

failure.message: KeyError: "Unsupported op type 'LOGISTIC'. Registered ops: [DEQUANTIZE, FULLY_CONNECTED, QUANTIZE]"

testcase.failure:
make_mlp_tflite = <function make_mlp_tflite.<locals>._make at 0x706231e4b240> run_interpreter = <function run_interpreter.<locals>._run at 0x706231e4b380>
def test__mlp_multiple_layers_forward(make_mlp_tflite: Callable, run_interpreter: Callable): model_path = make_mlp_tflite( input_size=32, hidden_sizes=[32, 16, 8], use_bias=True, activation="swish", float_io=True, )
x_train = np.random.uniform(-1.0, 1.0, (22, 32)).astype(np.float32) litert_outputs = run_interpreter(model_path, x_train)
# compare original LiteRT model with keras parsed > keras_model = litert_tunner.load_model(str(model_path)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/networks/test_mlp.py:44: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ src/litert_tunner/__init__.py:20: in load_model return graph.build_keras_model(graph_def) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/litert_tunner/graph/builder.py:41: in build_keras_model builder = registry.get_op_builder(op.op_type) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
op_type = 'LOGISTIC'
def get_op_builder(op_type: str) -> OpBuilder: """Look up a registered op builder by TFLite op name.
Args: op_type: TFLite operator type string.
Returns: The registered builder function.
Raises: KeyError: If no builder is registered for the given op type. """ if op_type not in _REGISTRY: registered = ", ".join(sorted(_REGISTRY.keys())) msg = f"Unsupported op type '{op_type}'. Registered ops: [{registered}]" > raise KeyError(msg) E KeyError: "Unsupported op type 'LOGISTIC'. Registered ops: [DEQUANTIZE, FULLY_CONNECTED, QUANTIZE]"
src/litert_tunner/ops/registry.py:67: KeyError
